---
title: "St Patrick's Day at Parkrun"
description: "We had a laugh at Parkrun on St Patrick's Day."
author: "synesis"
date: "2024-03-16"
categories: [running, Parkrun, personal, race, photo]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Parkrun, St Patrick's Day.](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

We had a laugh in today's Parkrun -- happy St Patrick's Day!


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_parkrun-stpatricksday-running-activity-7174898260501811200-zg8y).*
